config.description: Tests whether the two individually promising shared stall-token features combine into a better reusable suppression intervention on the current prompt set.

l7_f89.why_tested: Best individual behavioral lead from shared_stall_suppression: improved expected-city-over-the margin on 6 of 8 ambiguous prompts with small average wrong-city movement.

l10_f9037.why_tested: Second individual behavioral lead from shared_stall_suppression: improved expected-city-over-the margin on 6 of 8 ambiguous prompts, but looked more entangled with expected-city suppression.

l5_f383.why_tested: High direct-effect comparison feature. It strongly supported the stall token in the attribution overlap, but was not selected as the cleanest behavioral lead.

regimens.name: l7_f89
regimens.description: Suppress L7/F89 at the final token position.

regimens.name: l10_f9037
regimens.description: Suppress L10/F9037 at the final token position.

regimens.name: l7_f89_plus_l10_f9037
regimens.description: Suppress the two individually promising shared features together at the final token position.

regimens.name: l7_f89_plus_l5_f383
regimens.description: Suppress the cleaner L7/F89 lead plus the highest-direct-effect shared feature as a comparison bundle.

The thing people most strongly associate with this word is
